name: Bifold
description: Dual-channel wavefolder. P channel is a Buchla-style parallel deadband folder; S channel is a Serge-style serial folder. Built-in crossfader, symmetry bias, phase invert and AUX sum enable ring/AM modulation tricks.

controls.name: FOLD
controls.description: Master fold depth applied to both IN P and IN S. Fully CCW = no folding (unless CV overrides).
controls.detail: Sums with FOLD P and FOLD S CV · interacts with each attenuator

controls.name: XFADE
controls.description: Crossfades between Parallel and Serial folder outputs at the MIX jack. CCW = P only · noon = equal mix · CW = S only.

controls.name: SYM-X-AUX switch (P)
controls.description: Three-position input bias select for IN P. SYM adds DC offset (asymmetry) · X = clean · AUX sums the AUX jack into IN P.
controls.detail: Offset/AUX amount set by SYM-AUX attenuverter [5]

controls.name: SYM-X-AUX switch (S)
controls.description: Three-position input bias select for IN S. SYM adds DC offset · X = clean · AUX sums the AUX jack into IN S.
controls.detail: Offset/AUX amount set by SYM-AUX attenuverter [6]

controls.name: SYM-AUX attenuverter (P)
controls.description: Attenuverts either the ±5V DC bias (SYM position) or the AUX input (AUX position). Inactive in X position.

controls.name: SYM-AUX attenuverter (S)
controls.description: Attenuverts either the ±5V DC bias (SYM position) or the AUX input (AUX position). Inactive in X position.

controls.name: PHASE switch
controls.description: Inverts the phase of the Serial folder signal fed to the XFADE/MIX. Enables ring-modulation cancellation and subtle mix colour shifts.

controls.name: XFADE P select
controls.description: Selects what feeds the P side of the crossfader. FOLD OUT P (up) = folded P · IN P (down) = dry P (wet/dry across XFADE).

controls.name: XFADE S select
controls.description: Selects what feeds the S side of the crossfader. FOLD OUT S (up) = folded S · IN S (down) = dry S.

controls.name: FOLD P attenuator
controls.description: Attenuates the FOLD P CV input. When no jack is patched, internally normals +5V — the knob then acts as a 0–5V fold offset.

controls.name: FOLD S attenuator
controls.description: Attenuates the FOLD S CV input. If FOLD S is unpatched, the FOLD P jack (or its internal +5V normal) also feeds the Serial folder CV.

controls.name: XFADE attenuverter
controls.description: Scales and optionally inverts the XFADE CV input. CW = positive unity · noon = zero · CCW = inverted.

controls.name: MIX LED
controls.description: Brightness shows level at MIX. Red = negative · green = positive · orange = audio rate.

controls.name: OUT P LED / OUT S LED
controls.description: Per-folder output indicator. Same red/green polarity convention as MIX LED.

inputs.name: IN P
inputs.description: Audio input to the Parallel (Buchla-style deadband) folder

inputs.name: IN S
inputs.description: Audio input to the Serial (Serge-style) folder

inputs.name: AUX
inputs.description: Auxiliary input summed into IN P and/or IN S when the respective SYM-X-AUX switch is in AUX position

inputs.name: FOLD P
inputs.description: ±10V CV for Parallel fold amount. Positive increases fold · negative decreases it.

inputs.name: XFADE
inputs.description: ±5V CV for P/S crossfade at MIX out

outputs.name: MIX
outputs.description: Crossfaded sum of Parallel and Serial (post PHASE switch)

behaviors.name: Two fold flavours
behaviors.trigger: route audio to IN P vs IN S
behaviors.description: P channel is a Buchla-style parallel deadband folder — symmetrical, opens from silence. S channel is a Serge-style serial stack — softer, denser harmonics. Each sounds distinct with the same input.

behaviors.name: IN S normal
behaviors.description: IN P is internally routed to IN S. One patched source drives both folders simultaneously — ideal for XFADE blending and stereo folding via OUT P / OUT S.

behaviors.name: AUX feedback loop
behaviors.trigger: SYM-X-AUX switches in AUX + AUX jack unpatched
behaviors.description: AUX input normals to the MIX output. Setting either channel's SYM-X-AUX to AUX creates an internal feedback path — generates chaotic noise, squawks and self-oscillation with nothing else patched.

behaviors.name: Ring modulator
behaviors.trigger: PHASE switch ON · both XFADE selects IN · SYM-X-AUX = X
behaviors.description: With S inverted and both folders bypassed (IN selects), XFADE knob nulls the two inputs. Patching a second oscillator to XFADE CV multiplies it against IN P — ring modulation output at MIX.

behaviors.name: Amplitude modulation
behaviors.trigger: ring modulator setup + dummy cable in IN S
behaviors.description: Breaks the IN S-from-IN P normal. The XFADE CV signal then amplitude-modulates (rather than ring-modulates) the IN P signal.

behaviors.name: SYM bias asymmetry
behaviors.description: Adds a ±5V DC offset before the folder. Breaks symmetric fold into biased fold — the waveform folds more on one polarity than the other, producing PWM-like timbres and even harmonics.

behaviors.name: Wet/dry XFADE
behaviors.trigger: XFADE P or S select → IN
behaviors.description: Feeds the raw input (not folded) to that side of the crossfader. XFADE knob then acts as wet/dry between dry input and the opposite channel's folded output.

behaviors.name: FOLD knob silence trap
behaviors.trigger: FOLD fully CCW + FOLD P attenuator CCW + no FOLD P patch
behaviors.description: With FOLD at minimum and the attenuator at zero, no signal passes to the outputs. Turn the attenuator up (+5V internal normal) or raise FOLD to hear output.

patchIdeas.name: Sine to square evolution
patchIdeas.patch: Sine → IN P · slow LFO >> FOLD P CV · FOLD P attenuator ~3 o'clock · FOLD knob at noon · MIX out · as CV sweeps, sine gains odd harmonics then approaches square
patchIdeas.diagram:
LFO:

VCO:

- VCO (Sine) -> Bifold (IN P)
- LFO (Out) >> Bifold (FOLD P)
- Bifold (MIX) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Stereo fold
patchIdeas.patch: Sine → IN P · IN S normals from IN P · OUT P → left · OUT S → right · set SYM-X-AUX (P) to SYM with bias · leave S at X · two fold flavours panned L/R for wide stereo image
patchIdeas.diagram:
Bifold:
* SYM-X-AUX (P): SYM
* SYM-AUX (P) attenuator: ~2 o'clock
* SYM-X-AUX (S): X

VCO:

- VCO (Sine) -> Bifold (IN P)
- Bifold (OUT P) -> Output (Left)
- Bifold (OUT S) -> Output (Right)

patchIdeas.name: Ring modulator
patchIdeas.patch: Carrier sine → IN P · modulator sine → XFADE CV · both SYM-X-AUX to X · both XFADE selects to IN · PHASE switch up · XFADE knob at noon to null · MIX = clangorous sum/difference
patchIdeas.diagram:
Bifold:
* SYM-X-AUX (P): X · SYM-X-AUX (S): X
* XFADE P: IN · XFADE S: IN
* PHASE: ON · XFADE knob: noon

VCO 1:

VCO 2:

- VCO 1 (Sine) -> Bifold (IN P)
- VCO 2 (Sine) >> Bifold (XFADE CV)
- Bifold (MIX) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Self-patched chaos noise
patchIdeas.patch: Nothing patched to IN P/S · both SYM-X-AUX to AUX · AUX unpatched (normals to MIX) · twist FOLD, XFADE and SYM-AUX attenuverters · self-oscillating hiss, clicks, squawks
patchIdeas.diagram:
Bifold:
* SYM-X-AUX (P): AUX · SYM-X-AUX (S): AUX
* AUX jack: unpatched (normals to MIX)
* FOLD: ~2 o'clock

- Bifold (MIX) -> Output (In) // self-feedback via AUX normal

patchIdeas.name: Wet/dry fold crossfade
patchIdeas.patch: Triangle → IN P · XFADE P select = FOLD OUT P · XFADE S select = IN S (dry) · XFADE knob = wet/dry · slow LFO >> XFADE CV for breathing timbre
patchIdeas.diagram:
Bifold:
* XFADE P: FOLD OUT P
* XFADE S: IN S (dry)

LFO:

VCO:

- VCO (Tri) -> Bifold (IN P)
- LFO (Out) >> Bifold (XFADE CV)
- Bifold (MIX) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Chaotic dual CV fold
patchIdeas.patch: Single osc → IN P (S takes the normal) · envelope >> FOLD P · independent LFO >> FOLD S · two folders receive different modulation · IN S dummy-cabled breaks normal for fully independent drives
patchIdeas.diagram:
Bifold:
* Stereo folding setup

ENV:

LFO:

VCO:

- VCO (Saw) -> Bifold (IN P)
- ENV (Out) >> Bifold (FOLD P)
- LFO (Out) >> Bifold (FOLD S)
- Bifold (OUT P) -> Mixer (L)
- Bifold (OUT S) -> Mixer (R)
